creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hello,

Could you provide some details on "Acnodes Corporation provided FreeBSD
and Linux-based computer for customers ..."?  How do you support FreeBSD
on your systems?

Because I just checked your website and a search for "Linux" brings 2
results for screen panels.  And a search for "FreeBSD" comes up empty.

Best regards.

jkois

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
